# datahub_me (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the identity of the authenticated DataHub user.

Reading this data source makes a lightweight GraphQL call to DataHub. Referencing it in your configuration is a convenient way to smoke-test provider credentials at `terraform plan` time without creating any resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datahub_me" "current" {}

output "current_urn" {
  value = data.datahub_me.current.urn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the authenticated user, if set.
- `email` (String) The email address of the authenticated user, if set.
- `type` (String) The DataHub entity type of the authenticated user (typically `CORP_USER`).
- `urn` (String) The DataHub URN of the authenticated user (e.g. `urn:li:corpuser:jane`).
- `username` (String) The DataHub username of the authenticated user.
